review_text: Wow, this was a tough one! The Starvation Creek Trail to Mt. Defiance is seriously strenuous – that 5177 feet of elevation gain really takes it out of you. We saw a few elk grazing near the creek which was cool, but honestly, I’d rate this one as pretty tough and not worth the effort for just the views at the top. Parking was packed too, so go early!

trail_name: Mt Defiance via Starvation Creek Trail
review_text: This climb was brutal, seriously. The rain made the rocks slick and it was a slog going up – definitely worth bringing good boots. Parking was almost full when we got there too!

trail_name: Mt Defiance via Starvation Creek Trail
